description: pin_strong is len(pin) >= 8; buffer_ok is len(text) <= size; input_clean is no quote; security_score adds 20 per passing defense (max 100).
security_score combines all five checks correctly, so weak configs score lower (e.g. 80 / 60 / 20) and a full lockdown scores 100.
security_score reuses pin_strong, buffer_ok, and input_clean instead of repeating the logic; clear names; a return on every path.
